sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this puzzle/maze game

special_mechanics.name: Maze Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Tamagon (green dragon) navigating through Pac-Man-styled mazes patrolled by monsters. Maze walls can move via pulleys/ropes controlled by the Devil, creating hazard of being squished between wall and outer boundary.

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Collecting Crosses or Bibles grants Tamagon fire-breathing ability and allows eating dots. Without a cross/Bible, character is helpless and cannot complete maze.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Puzzle/maze game. No physics/movement documentation available in sources. Game is primarily about maze navigation strategy rather than precise movement mechanics. Sources contain game history, development notes (Miyamoto/Tezuka), and gameplay overview but no technical movement parameters.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Devil World NES article)
